languages.text: "Святыня способна автономно врачевать плоть и благословлять ее аугментациями под надзором сведущего генетора. Сложнейшие процедуры могут свершаться с невообразимой скоростью и точностью, а стимуляторы вводиться в требуемых пропорциях и комбинациях. Это настоящее чудо Омниссии!"

"The shrine is capable of autonomously healing flesh and blessing it with augmentations under the supervision of a knowledgeable Genetor. Complex procedures can be performed with unimaginable speed and precision, and stimulants administered in the required proportions and combinations. It is a true miracle of the Omnissiah!"
languages.original_text: "Святыня способна автономно врачевать плоть и благословлять ее аугментациями под надзором сведущего генетора. Сложнейшие процедуры могут свершаться с невообразимой скоростью и точностью, а стимуляторы вводиться в требуемых пропорциях и комбинациях. Это настоящее чудо Омниссии!"

traits.locale_text: "The shrine is capable of autonomously healing flesh and blessing it with augmentations under the supervision of a knowledgeable Genetor. Complex procedures can be performed with unimaginable speed and precision, and stimulants administered in the required proportions and combinations. It is a true miracle of the Omnissiah!"

"The shrine is capable of autonomously healing flesh and blessing it with augmentations under the supervision of a knowledgeable Genetor. Complex procedures can be performed with unimaginable speed and precision, and stimulants administered in the required proportions and combinations. It is a true miracle of the Omnissiah!"

"The shrine is capable of autonomously healing flesh and blessing it with augmentations under the supervision of a knowledgeable Genetor. Complex procedures can be performed with unimaginable speed and precision, and stimulants administered in the required proportions and combinations. It is a true miracle of the Omnissiah!"

languages.text: « L'autel est capable de guérir la chair de façon autonome, ainsi que de lui accorder la bénédiction des augmentations, sous la supervision d'un genetor érudit. Il devient possible d'exécuter des procédures complexes avec une vitesse et une précision inimaginables, et d'administrer des stimulants selon les proportions et combinaisons requises. C'est un véritable miracle de l'Omnimessie ! »
languages.original_text: "The shrine is capable of autonomously healing flesh and blessing it with augmentations under the supervision of a knowledgeable Genetor. Complex procedures can be performed with unimaginable speed and precision, and stimulants administered in the required proportions and combinations. It is a true miracle of the Omnissiah!"

traits.locale_text: « L'autel est capable de guérir la chair de façon autonome, ainsi que de lui accorder la bénédiction des augmentations, sous la supervision d'un genetor érudit. Il devient possible d'exécuter des procédures complexes avec une vitesse et une précision inimaginables, et d'administrer des stimulants selon les proportions et combinaisons requises. C'est un véritable miracle de l'Omnimessie ! »

languages.text: "Der Schrein ist in der Lage, Fleisch selbständig zu heilen und unter der Aufsicht eines sachkundigen Genetors mit Augmentationen zu segnen. Während komplexe Prozeduren mit unvorstellbarer Geschwindigkeit und Präzision erfolgen, können Stimulanzien in den erforderlichen Verhältnissen und Kombinationen verabreicht werden. Er ist ein wahres Wunder des Omnissiah!"
languages.original_text: "The shrine is capable of autonomously healing flesh and blessing it with augmentations under the supervision of a knowledgeable Genetor. Complex procedures can be performed with unimaginable speed and precision, and stimulants administered in the required proportions and combinations. It is a true miracle of the Omnissiah!"

traits.locale_text: "Der Schrein ist in der Lage, Fleisch selbständig zu heilen und unter der Aufsicht eines sachkundigen Genetors mit Augmentationen zu segnen. Während komplexe Prozeduren mit unvorstellbarer Geschwindigkeit und Präzision erfolgen, können Stimulanzien in den erforderlichen Verhältnissen und Kombinationen verabreicht werden. Er ist ein wahres Wunder des Omnissiah!"

languages.text: “这个圣坛能在知识渊博的基因士的监督下，自主修复血肉并为其施予植入物。它能以难以想象的速度和精度完成复杂手术，也能按所需比例和组合注入兴奋剂。这是真正属于欧姆尼赛亚的奇迹！”
languages.original_text: "The shrine is capable of autonomously healing flesh and blessing it with augmentations under the supervision of a knowledgeable Genetor. Complex procedures can be performed with unimaginable speed and precision, and stimulants administered in the required proportions and combinations. It is a true miracle of the Omnissiah!"

traits.locale_text: “这个圣坛能在知识渊博的基因士的监督下，自主修复血肉并为其施予植入物。它能以难以想象的速度和精度完成复杂手术，也能按所需比例和组合注入兴奋剂。这是真正属于欧姆尼赛亚的奇迹！”

languages.text: «Este altar es capaz de sanar la carne de forma autónoma y bendecirla con aumentos bajo la supervisión de un genetor experimentado. Se pueden ejecutar intervenciones complejas con una velocidad y una precisión inimaginables, aplicando las combinaciones y proporciones adecuadas de estimulantes. ¡Es un verdadero milagro del Omnissiah!».
languages.original_text: "The shrine is capable of autonomously healing flesh and blessing it with augmentations under the supervision of a knowledgeable Genetor. Complex procedures can be performed with unimaginable speed and precision, and stimulants administered in the required proportions and combinations. It is a true miracle of the Omnissiah!"

traits.locale_text: «Este altar es capaz de sanar la carne de forma autónoma y bendecirla con aumentos bajo la supervisión de un genetor experimentado. Se pueden ejecutar intervenciones complejas con una velocidad y una precisión inimaginables, aplicando las combinaciones y proporciones adecuadas de estimulantes. ¡Es un verdadero milagro del Omnissiah!».

languages.text: "Tapınak, bilgili bir Genetör'ün gözetimi altında eti otonom olarak iyileştirme ve ogmentasyonlarla kutsama yeteneğine sahiptir. Karmaşık prosedürler, akıl almaz bir hızla ve hassasiyetle gerçekleştirilebilir. Uyarıcılar, gerekli oran ve kombinasyonlarda uygulanabilir. Bu, Hermesih'in gerçek bir mucizesidir!"
languages.original_text: "The shrine is capable of autonomously healing flesh and blessing it with augmentations under the supervision of a knowledgeable Genetor. Complex procedures can be performed with unimaginable speed and precision, and stimulants administered in the required proportions and combinations. It is a true miracle of the Omnissiah!"

traits.locale_text: "Tapınak, bilgili bir Genetör'ün gözetimi altında eti otonom olarak iyileştirme ve ogmentasyonlarla kutsama yeteneğine sahiptir. Karmaşık prosedürler, akıl almaz bir hızla ve hassasiyetle gerçekleştirilebilir. Uyarıcılar, gerekli oran ve kombinasyonlarda uygulanabilir. Bu, Hermesih'in gerçek bir mucizesidir!"

languages.text: 「この神殿は、知識豊富なジェネーターの監督のもとで、肉体を自律的に治癒し、強化の祝福を与えることができる。複雑な手順は想像を絶する速度と精度で実行され、必要な量と組み合わせの薬剤が投与される。まさにオムニシアの奇跡である！」
languages.original_text: "The shrine is capable of autonomously healing flesh and blessing it with augmentations under the supervision of a knowledgeable Genetor. Complex procedures can be performed with unimaginable speed and precision, and stimulants administered in the required proportions and combinations. It is a true miracle of the Omnissiah!"

traits.locale_text: 「この神殿は、知識豊富なジェネーターの監督のもとで、肉体を自律的に治癒し、強化の祝福を与えることができる。複雑な手順は想像を絶する速度と精度で実行され、必要な量と組み合わせの薬剤が投与される。まさにオムニシアの奇跡である！」
